para_trans: Regarding the constitution of the Monitoring Committee for the Central Government's Special Assistance to States for Capital Investment Scheme 2026-27 for the reforms envisaged in Part-IV.
Government Decision No: Shrinkage-2026 / Q. No.39 / Finance,
Read: 1. Government Decision Finance Department No. 02 JUNE 2026, 2. Government Refinance Sheet, Department of Finance, No. June 10, 2026.

Government Decision: - Under the Government Decision at Read 9 above, the Central Government has constituted a Monitoring Committee to make the amendments specified in Part-IV of the Special Assistance Scheme for Capital Investments to the States 2026-27. The committee consists of the following members:
Since components 2 and 4 of the Part- "/" of the scheme belong to the Forest Department, the above
The committee is being constituted with Additional Chief Secretary (Forests), Revenue and Forest Department as its member at No. 4 (A).
table_trans: Additional Chief Secretary (Financial Gospels), Department of Finance
Additional Chief Secretary (Services), General Administration Department
Additional Chief Secretary, Public Works Department
Principal Secretary (Industries), Industries, Power, Labour & Mining Department
Principal Secretary, Accounts and Ator fed Department
Secretary, Department of Electronics, Information and Technology and Artificial Intelligence
Officer of the Audit and Accounts Department of India (1A & AD) nominated by the Accountant General (Audit) -11, Maharashtra, Nagpur
Director, Accounts B Treasuries, Finance Department

para_trans: 3. Also Accountant General (Audit- ), Nagpur vide his letter dated 12th June, 2026.
The following officers have been nominated as officers of the Audit and Accounts Department of India as members of the Committee. He is also being inducted as a member of the committee.
The decision is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra Wwww.maharashtra.gov.in.
